description:
Parent epic: V3 E1: Simplified DSL foundation

Source task 3/13 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Keep tool/action definitions outside the agent block.

Epic closure criteria:
- the simplified DSL is the only documented DSL
- pre-V3 DSL shapes are removed
- DSL tests cover success, failure, and error-message quality

comments.text: Implemented the V3 top-level tools section with action entries wired into the existing tool resolution and verifier path. Added a compile-time DSL test proving actions remain outside the agent block and generate the expected tool module/name. Verification: mix format --check-formatted, mix compile --warnings-as-errors, mix test test/jidoka/dsl_validation_test.exs, mix test.

title: E1: Keep tool/action definitions outside the agent block
